fields.name: Basic HTML
fields.description: An HTML element is defined by a start tag, some content, and an end tag.

fields.name: Text Formatting
fields.description: HTML contains several elements for defining text with a special meaning.

fields.name: Forms and Input
fields.description: An HTML form is used to collect user input. The user input is most often sent to a server for processing.

fields.name: Links
fields.description: Links are found in nearly all web pages. Links allow users to click their way from page to page.

fields.name: Lists
fields.description: HTML lists allow web developers to group a set of related items in lists.

fields.name: Tables
fields.description: HTML tables allow web developers to arrange data into rows and columns.

fields.name: Programming
fields.description: Programming/Javascript elements

fields.name: Styles and Semantics
fields.description: define the meaning of the content they contain

fields.name: <!DOCTYPE>
fields.description: Defines the document type

fields.name: <html>
fields.description: Defines an HTML document

fields.name: <head>
fields.description: Contains metadata/information for the document

fields.name: <title>
fields.description: Defines a title for the document

fields.name: <body>
fields.description: Defines the document's body

fields.name: <h1> to <h6>
fields.description: Defines HTML headings
Defines a paragraph
Inserts a single line break

fields.name: <hr>
fields.description: Defines a thematic change in the content
Defines a comment

fields.name: <b>
fields.description: Bold Text

fields.name: <strong>
fields.description: Important text

fields.name: <i>
fields.description: Italic text

fields.name: <em>
fields.description: Emphasized text

fields.name: <mark>
fields.description: Marked text

fields.name: <small>
fields.description: Smaller text

fields.name: <del>
fields.description: Deleted text

fields.name: <ins>
fields.description: Inserted text

fields.name: <sub>
fields.description: Subscript text

fields.name: <sup>
fields.description: Superscript text

fields.name: <form>
fields.description: Defines an HTML form for user input

fields.name: <input>
fields.description: Defines an input control

fields.name: <textarea>
fields.description: Defines a multiline input control (text area)

fields.name: <button>
fields.description: Defines a clickable button

fields.name: <select>
fields.description: Defines a drop-down list

fields.name: <optgroup>
fields.description: Defines a group of related options in a drop-down list

fields.name: <option>
fields.description: Defines an option in a drop-down list

fields.name: <label>
fields.description: Defines a label for an <input> element

fields.name: <fieldset>
fields.description: Groups related elements in a form

fields.name: <legend>
fields.description: Defines a caption for a <fieldset> element

fields.name: <datalist>
fields.description: Specifies a list of pre-defined options for input controls

fields.name: <output>
fields.description: Defines the result of a calculation

fields.name: <a>
fields.description: Defines a hyperlink

fields.name: <link>
fields.description: Defines the relationship between a document and an external resource (most used to link to style sheets)

fields.name: <nav>
fields.description: Defines navigation links

fields.name: <menu>
fields.description: Defines an alternative unordered list

fields.name: <ul>
fields.description: Defines an unordered list

fields.name: <ol>
fields.description: Defines an ordered list

fields.name: <li>
fields.description: Defines a list item

fields.name: <dl>
fields.description: Defines a description list

fields.name: <dt>
fields.description: Defines a term/name in a description list

fields.name: <dd>
fields.description: Defines a description of a term/name in a description list

fields.name: <table>
fields.description: Defines a table

fields.name: <th>
fields.description: Defines a header cell in a table

fields.name: <tr>
fields.description: Defines a row in a table

fields.name: <td>
fields.description: Defines a cell in a table

fields.name: <caption>
fields.description: Defines a table caption

fields.name: <colgroup>
fields.description: Specifies a group of one or more columns in a table for formatting

fields.name: <col>
fields.description: Specifies column properties for each column within a <colgroup> element

fields.name: <thead>
fields.description: Groups the header content in a table

fields.name: <tbody>
fields.description: Groups the body content in a table

fields.name: <tfoot>
fields.description: Groups the footer content in a table

fields.name: <script>
fields.description: Defines a client-side script

fields.name: <noscript>
fields.description: Defines an alternate content for users that do not support client-side scripts

fields.name: <embed>
fields.description: Defines a container for an external resource

fields.name: <object>
fields.description: Defines a container for an external resource

fields.name: <param>
fields.description: Defines a parameter for an object

fields.name: <style>
fields.description: Defines style information for a document

fields.name: <div>
fields.description: Defines a section in a document

fields.name: <span>
fields.description: Defines a section in a document

fields.name: <header>
fields.description: Defines a header for a document or section

fields.name: <hgroup>
fields.description: Defines a header and related content

fields.name: <footer>
fields.description: Defines a footer for a document or section

fields.name: <main>
fields.description: Specifies the main content of a document

fields.name: <section>
fields.description: Defines a section in a document

fields.name: <search>
fields.description: Defines a search section

fields.name: <article>
fields.description: Defines an article

fields.name: <aside>
fields.description: Defines content aside from the page content

fields.name: <details>
fields.description: Defines additional details that the user can view or hide

fields.name: <dialog>
fields.description: Defines a dialog box or window

fields.name: <summary>
fields.description: Defines a visible heading for a <details> element

fields.name: <data>
fields.description: Adds a machine-readable translation of a given content
